stemHtml: If the airborne weather radar system is fitted with an auto-tilt function, what does that mean? The radar antenna tilt is automatically adjusted..

options.a: to tilt fully down when taxiing to reduce the possibility of injury to ground personnel.
options.b: based on the attitude of the aircraft.
options.c: to track the areas with the greatest intensity of precipitation.
options.d: based on the altitude of the aircraft.
